zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Puleston於大約1280年出生在英國威爾斯福林爾沃特波瑞時，她的父親Richard de Puleston22歲，母親Angharad Warenne17歲。她於1294年與Philip De Chetwynd在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾英格斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Puleston于大约1280年出生在英国威尔斯福林爾沃特波瑞时，她的父亲Richard de Puleston22岁，母亲Angharad Warenne17岁。她于1294年与Philip De Chetwynd在英国英格兰斯塔福爾英格斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Puleston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Puleston (Shrops), which is recorded as Plivesdone in 1086 and Pivelesdon’ in 1200. The place-name probably derives from an Old English personal name * Peofel (genitive * Peofeles) + Old English dūn ‘hill’. See also Pilson .

variants.name: Pilson
meanings: perhaps a variant of Puleston, a habitational name from the Shropshire placename Puleston, or, alternatively, a variant of Poulson with unrounding of the vowel.
perhaps a variant of Pelson (now rare or extinct in Britain), from the Middle English personal name Pell (see Pell ) + son.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Puleston was born about 1280, in Worthenbury, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Puleston, was 22 and her mother, Angharad Warenne, was 17. She married Philip De Chetwynd in 1294, in Ingestre, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1350, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Puleston est née environ 1280, à Worthenbury, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Puleston, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Angharad Warenne, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Philip De Chetwynd en 1294, à Ingestre, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1350, à l’âge de 71 ans.

Sie hat 1294 in Ingestre, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Philip De Chetwynd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 71 Jahren.

Lei sposato Philip De Chetwynd nel 1294, nel Ingestre, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1350, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Pulestonが約1280年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアウオルスエンブリーで生まれた時，父Richard de Pulestonは22歳，母Angharad Warenneは17歳であった。1294年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアインジェストアでPhilip De Chetwyndと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年に71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Puleston(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르 워테버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Puleston(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Angharad Warenne(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1294년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 잉스트르에서 Philip De Chetwynd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Puleston родилась около 1280 г. в местности вортенбури, флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard de Puleston было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Angharad Warenne, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip De Chetwynd в 1294 г. в местности ингестр, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1350 г. в возрасте 71 год.
